zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ann Todlerby是John Tolderby的女兒，於1577年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯。她於1597年1月與Thomas Prence Sr.在英國格盧斯特斯爾諾瑟利亞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1630年8月14日在英國波克夏易亞斯特 雪福德享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞洛瑟爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ann Todlerby是John Tolderby的女儿，于1577年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯。她于1597年1月与Thomas Prence Sr.在英国格盧斯特斯爾諾瑟利亞结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1630年8月14日在英国波克夏易亞斯特 雪福德享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞洛瑟爾。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ann Todlerby was born in 1577, in Lechlade-on-Thames, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of John Tolderby. She married Thomas Prence Sr. in January 1597, in Northleach, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died on 14 August 1630, in East Shefford, Berkshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Rotherhithe, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ann Todlerby est née en 1577, à Lechlade-on-Thames, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de John Tolderby. Elle a épousé Thomas Prence Sr. en janvier 1597, à Northleach, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 août 1630, à East Shefford, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Rotherhithe, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ann Todlerbyは1577年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアレチラデ-オン-サムスでJohn Tolderbyの娘として生まれた。1597年1月にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアノースレアチでThomas Prence Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1630年8月14日にイギリスバークシュアイアエアスト シェフォードで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススリーロスエルヒスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ann Todlerby(은)는 1577년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 렉h라데--섬스에서 John Tolderby의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1597년 1월 영국 그루스스터실르 노르슬리치에서 Thomas Prence Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1630년 8월 14일 영국 버크실르 이스트 셰퍼드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리 로더히테에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas Prence Sr. em janeiro de 1597, em Northleach, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de agosto de 1630, em East Shefford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Rotherhithe, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ann Todlerby родилась в 1577 г. в местности лечладе-он-тамесь, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали John Tolderby. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Prence Sr. январь 1597 г. в местности нортлич, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 14 августа 1630 г. в местности эаст шеффорд, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности ротирит, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió el 14 de agosto de 1630, en East Shefford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Rotherhithe, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
